zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret於1392年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾時，她的父親William Raynes27歲，母親Emely Brampton32歲。她於1409年與Thomas Mede在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1457年在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 瑪麗 雷可利福享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret was born in 1392, in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Raynes, was 27 and her mother, Emely Brampton, was 32. She married Thomas Mede in 1409, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1457, in Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret est née en 1392, à Wraxall, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Raynes, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Emely Brampton, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Mede en 1409, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1457, à Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ko.Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershi: 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 메리 레드클리프
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret(이)가 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 라스알에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Raynes(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emely Brampton(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Thomas Mede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 메리 레드클리프에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Mede в 1409 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1457 г. в местности бристол ст мэри редклифф, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.
